title: podochilus albus
intro: Podochilus albus, also known as the white orchid tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. It is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to provide various health benefits, including the treatment of fever, digestive issues, and skin problems. In herbal preparations, the roots and leaves of Podochilus albus are often used to make teas, infusions, and powders, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
